item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 24 Feb 2026
item.description:
1. OSEC-2026-01 in the OCaml runtime: Buffer Over-Read in OCaml Marshal Deserialization
  2. OCaml 5.4.1 and 4.14.3 released
  3. Ann: Ochat — Try Ochat for terminal-based LLM workflows
  4. Serialport - new serial communication library
  5. Slipshow!
  6. Remote OCaml Distributed Systems Engineer (Linux / Storage / Networking) – whitesky.cloud – EMEA/Asia
  7. Grace 0.3.0 💅, fancy diagnostics library for compilers
  8. Js_of_ocaml / Wasm_of_ocaml 6.3
  9. kqueue-ml 0.5.0
  10. Dune 3.21.0
  11. Other OCaml News
